claim_support.reason: All material claims are accompanied by authoritative cited chunk IDs or calc IDs. The text aligns with the content of the provided evidence blocks, even where the evidence itself contains mathematical inconsistencies.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical errors in key growth metrics. Revenue YoY growth is stated as 36.27% based on $3.096B vs $2.748B (actual ~12.7%). Net Income YoY growth is stated as 316.88% based on $642M vs $555M (actual ~15.7%). These errors materially misrepresent financial performance.

citation_precision.reason: Authoritative cited chunk IDs and calc IDs are provided for each paragraph and correctly map to the evidence blocks. Inline citation labels (e.g., C012) are writer-side and do not need to match UUIDs per instructions.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates and financial periods are on or before the as-of date of 2025-08-11. No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: Severe internal inconsistencies within paragraphs. Reported growth percentages contradict the reported absolute values in the same sentences (e.g., 36.27% growth claimed on $2.748B base does not equal $3.096B current). This logical contradiction affects investment interpretation.

numerical_errors.explanation: Revenue YoY growth claimed as 36.27% based on Q2 2025 ($3.096B) vs Q2 2024 ($2.748B). Mathematical calculation yields ~12.7%. The 36.27% figure appears to be QoQ growth mislabeled as YoY.
numerical_errors.section: Recent Developments Paragraph 1; Financial Analysis Paragraph 1
numerical_errors.offending_span: Revenue reached $3.096B in Q2 2025, representing 36.27% YoY growth compared to Q2 2024's $2.748B

numerical_errors.explanation: Net Income YoY growth claimed as 316.88% based on Q2 2025 ($642M) vs Q2 2024 ($555M). Mathematical calculation yields ~15.7%. The 316.88% figure appears to be QoQ growth (vs Q1 2025 $154M) mislabeled as YoY.
numerical_errors.section: Recent Developments Paragraph 1; Business & Competitive Analysis Paragraph 3
numerical_errors.offending_span: Net income surged to $642M, up 316.88% YoY from $555M in Q2 2024

inconsistencies.explanation: Internal contradiction between absolute values and growth rates within the same sentences. The stated growth rates do not mathematically derive from the stated base and current period values, creating logical inconsistencies in the financial analysis.
inconsistencies.section: Recent Developments Paragraph 1; Financial Analysis Paragraph 1
inconsistencies.offending_span: Revenue reached $3.096B... representing 36.27% YoY growth compared to Q2 2024's $2.748B... Net income surged to $642M, up 316.88% YoY from $555M
